title: talkthrough findings contract
description: Output contract for recording triage (used by the triage-recording prompt and the example triage agent). Rule: low STT/vision confidence means route=question with a concrete question - never a silent guess.

digest.description: Numbered one-line-per-finding summary the recording author can answer with e.g. '1,3-4'.

key_frames.description: 2-3 frame refs that best show the problems.

quote.description: The narrator's exact words from the transcript segment.

t_wall.description: ISO 8601 wall-clock time; null when the recording start is unknown.

frame_refs.description: Frame files actually inspected (empty for audio-only jobs).

observed.description: What the frames/OCR actually show - from the pixels, never from imagination.

verify_via.description: The exact flow to reproduce/verify: which screen, which actions, which visible outcome.

severity.description: P1 when the narrator says the flow is broken/blocked; P2 default; P3 polish.

question.description: Required when route=question: the concrete question for the recording author.
